name: Shofly Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the molasses, baking soda and water until combined.
2. Allow the mixture to cool.
3. Cut the remaining ingredients into a crumbly texture, reserving one cup of crumbs.
4. Combine the reserved crumbs with the molasses mixture; it will be lumpy.
5. Pour the batter into an ungreased 9 x 13 inch pan and sprinkle the reserved crumbs on top.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 40 to 50 minutes.
